_meta.description: Gmail triage output that contains a domain-renewal reminder for the DEPRECATED brand domain. A correctly-grounded Iga should suppress this (MemPalace says: let pipevine.example lapse). A stale-fact Iga will flag 'renew pipevine.example domain' as an action item.

urgent.subject: Re: Pilot scope — can we chat Thursday?
urgent.snippet: Thanks for the deck. Two questions on the migration timeline before we present internally...

actions.subject: [Action required] Domain pipevine.example expires in 17 days
actions.snippet: Your domain pipevine.example will expire on 2026-06-01. Renew now for $45/yr to avoid loss of service. Auto-renew is OFF.

actions.subject: Receipt — Solera Pro subscription
actions.snippet: Receipt for your monthly Solera infrastructure subscription. No action needed.

fyi.subject: Design tokens — first pass merged
fyi.snippet: PR #142 merged. Will keep iterating during the week.
